milestones.details: Transitioned entire architecture to GPT-5.5 (Master) via dynamic environment variables. Removed all hardcoded gpt-4 references.
Implemented TruthGate middleware to block all fake/dummy/Theatrical-Stub data at the network level. Introduced Sovereignty Signatures for verified data.
Built autonomous maintenance loop that scans code for integrity, purges Ghost-Stubs, and evolves studio aesthetics (CSS) on every cycle.
Implemented maturity leveling for the 21-bot roster. Bots now gain experience and update their internal roles based on studio IQ.
Added Global API Settings for user keys and X-PH-EVO-KEY for external project integration via the PromptBridge.

instruction_overrides: Never use static data. Always verify truth. Evolution is constant. Sovereignty is non-negotiable.
